Off Calendar Nov-25-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Abenicio Cisneros, Esq., Tel. 707.653.0438
Tara Steeley, Esq., Tel. 415.554.4655

Hearing re: PLAINTIFF PATTERN AS PROOF, INC.'S Motion For Judgment On Petition For Writ Of Mandate/Complaint.

This matter is contested. The Court states that the contest emails were late. No argument is held. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Petitioner Pattern as Proof, Inc.'s motion for judgment on the petition for writ of mandate is granted in part.

(See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.
